snippet.title: They discharged me from the hospital - Part 2
snippet.description:
Thank you for sending me all your overwhelming love and support. While I was miserable, one of the few things that cracked a smile on my face was interacting with you all through this vlog. Thank you for getting my mind off of things. 
Thank you for giving me the strength to carry on, no matter what, through the kind words you expressed in the comments. Thank you from the bottom of my heart for always having my back. I don’t think I can ever hope to repay you. 

My Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/priyankapdeshpande/?hl=en

#ThankYouMakkale #StaySafe #IamBack

snippet.title: I got admitted to the hospital - Part 1
snippet.description:
Makkale.. I was not feeling well and got admitted to the hospital. The whole hospital scene was really depressing. Vlogging from the hospital bed and staying positive helped me recover faster 😛 A positive attitude can recreate your reality. 

The times are tough, everyone is in some version of covid crises directly or indirectly. Just stick around and stay positive. #ThisTooShallPass #StayStrong #StaySafe

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/priyankapdeshpande/?hl=en

snippet.title: Strengthen The Lungs | Day 3 of 10 Days Breath And Meditation Journey With Gurudev
snippet.description:
Strengthen The Lungs | Day 3 of 10 Days Breath And Meditation Journey With Gurudev

Sign up and receive updates of this journey via WhatsApp on http://aoliv.in/10days

We take thousands of breaths each day and inhale thousands of liters of air. But, if our body isn't optimized and we aren't breathing properly then the lungs aren't able to take in as many nutrients as they can. By learning the breathing exercises on the Breathing and Meditation challenge, you can give your respiratory system a much-needed boost to tackle the COVID-19 virus and any other ailments that might come your way.

The meditation led by Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar will further relax the mind and get rid of the anxiety and despair that we are going through on a daily basis.

Invigorate your body and mind by learning powerful processes on the Online Meditation and Breath Workshop: 👉🏽 https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

About Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar

Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar is a world-renowned humanitarian, spiritual leader, and an ambassador of peace and human values. Through his life and work, Gurudev has inspired millions around the world with a vision of a stress-free and violence-free world.
Gurudev founded The Art of Living, a non-profit organization that is engaged in stress-management and service initiatives. The programs designed by Gurudev empower people with techniques and tools to live a deeper and blissful life.

#GurudevSriSriRaviShankar #ArtofLiving #BreathHeals

snippet.title: खांसी-जुकाम गले नाक छाती में जमा हुआ कफ बलगम 1बार मै निकाल देगा ये घरेलू नुस्खा ​Remedy Cough Cold
snippet.description:
sardi se chutkara pane ka aasan tarika.Ab khasi se paye chutkara ghar par hi aasani se.Yeh video me dekhiye sardi jukam k gharelu nuskhe,sardi ka  ilaj,khasi ki  dawai, cough syrup, sardi khasi khasi ka gharelu ilaj,gale m dard ka ilaj, get rid of cough instantly, cough cold home remedy, get rid of cough at home, how to remove cough naturally, khasi se chutkara kaise paye, how to get rid of cold and cough, sardi se chutkara pane K upay, homemade solution, gharelu nuskhe,gharelu nuskhe ramdev , sardi jukam k gharelu nuskhe bachoo k liye, cold cough, cough medicine, cough, cough remedies, cold remedies, best cough medicine, home remedies for cold, cold medicine, best cough medicine,cold medicine for Kids,best way to get rid of a cold, how to get rid of cold, getting rid of cold fast,get rid of cold fast,ways to get rid of a cold,cough and cold home remedies,home remedies for cold,sardi jukam ke gharelu nuskhe,cough remedy for kids, cough remedy in hindi,cough ka ilaj in hindi,khasi kaise thik kare,khasi kaise dur kare gharelu upay,sardi khasi ki dawa,sardi khasi bukhar ka gharelu upay,sardi khasi bukhar ka syrup,sardi khasi ki dawa for baby,homemade remedy for cough in hindi,how to get rid of cough in hindi,easy home recipes,homemade kadha for cough,how to make kadha for cough,kadha,immunity booster aur bhi kai gharelu nushke dekhiyeसिर्फ दस मिनट में खांसी से पाये छुटकारा | खाँसी के घरेलू उपचार | cough remedy in hindi
खांसी यूं तो एक सामान्य बीमारी है, लेकिन यह तकलीफ बहुत देती है।  इसलिए आप कुछ कारगर घरेलू उपाय भी आजमा सकते हैं। खांसी किसी भी समय हो सकती है। वैसे तो सर्दी, खांसी, सिरदर्द जैसी कुछ बीमारियां होती हैं जिनके इलाज के लिए हम चिकित्सक के पास जाने से बचते हैं। खांसी की समस्या होने पर आप सुकून से कोई काम नहीं कर सकते हैं। खांसी किसी भी वजह से हो सकती है। बदलता मौसम, ठंडा-गर्म खा या पी लेना या फिर धूल या किसी अन्यी चीज से एलर्जी के कारण …isiliye humne khasi per ek bahuthi powerfull gharelu upay yha per bataya hai jo ki kaisi bhi khasi per ramban ka kam karta hai,
khansi ke gharelu upay,khansi ke gharelu nuskhe,khansi ko kaise thik kare,khansi ka ilaj,khansi ka upay,khansi ka ilaj in hindi,khansi ka ilaj in hindi desi,sukhi khansi ka ilaj in hindi,सुखी खांसी का इलाज,सूखी खांसी का घरेलू इलाज,how to control cough at home,how to cure cough,how to cure cough fast,how to cure cough naturally,how to cure cold and cough naturally,khokla kasa thik karava,khokla,khansi,cold cough,cough ka ilaj,khokla upay
खाँसी कफ से 1 बार मे ही छुटकारा पाए इस असरदार घरेलू नुक्से से | HOME REMEDIES FOR COUGH|Cough Medicine

 आज मैं आपके लिए बहुत ही असरदार जबरदस्त 1 घरेलू नुक्से हर प्रकार की खांसी और कफ के लिए लेकर आई हूं जिसे हम मात्र दो सामग्री से बना सकते हैं इससे बनाने में जरा भी मेहनत नहीं लगता है आप इसे 12 साल के ऊपर के बच्चे को दे सकते हैं थोड़ा सा और वैसे हर उम्र के लोग इसका सेवन कर सकते हैं होम रेमेडीज का कोई भी साइड इफेक्ट नहीं होता और बहुत ही इसके हेल्थ बेनिफिट्स होते हैं एक बार अगर आप यह घरेलू उपाय करते हैं तो आप की खासी धीरे-धीरे ठीक होने लगेगी और इसके बाद आपको पानी नहीं पीना है पानी जब भी पीना है तो गर्म पानी पीना है cough and cold home remedies,home remedies for cold,sardi jukam ke gharelu nuskhe,cough remedy for kids,cough remedy in hindi,cough ka ilaj in hindi,khasi kaise thik kare,khasi kaise dur kare gharelu upay,sardi khasi ki dawa,sardi khasi bukhar ka gharelu upay,sardi khasi bukhar ka syrup,sardi khasi ki dawa for baby,homemade remedy for cough in hindi,how to get rid of cough in hindi,easy home recipes,homemade kadha for cough,how to make kadha for cough,kadha,chati me jama kaf kaise nikale , balgam khatam karne ka tarika, balgam kaise nikale
#coughhomeremedies #khasikafkaghreluupay #ghrelunukse

snippet.title: Breathe Right To Boost Immunity | Day 2 of 10 Days Breath And Meditation Journey With Gurudev
snippet.description:
Breathe Right To Boost Immunity | Day 2 of 10 Days Breath And Meditation Journey With Gurudev

Learn the most powerful breathing exercise in the world by doing the Online Meditation and Breath Workshop here:

Most people don't know that they are using only 33% of their lung capacity. This can be increased by learning yogic breathing or deep-focused breathing. On Day 2 of the Breathing and meditation challenge, we bring you powerful breathing exercises that can enhance your lung capacity for oxygen. The combination of breathing exercises and meditation will revitalize your body and relax your mind.

Optimize your oxygen capacity by learning the most powerful breathing and meditation exercise in the world, Sudarshan Kriya on the Online Meditation and Breath Workshop: 👉🏽 https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

About Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar

Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar is a world-renowned humanitarian, spiritual leader, and an ambassador of peace and human values. Through his life and work, Gurudev has inspired millions around the world with a vision of a stress-free and violence-free world.
Gurudev founded The Art of Living, a non-profit organization that is engaged in stress-management and service initiatives. The programs designed by Gurudev empower people with techniques and tools to live a deeper and blissful life.

#GurudevSriSriRaviShankar #ArtofLiving #BreathHeals

hi.description:

 यहां ऑनलाइन मेडिटेशन और बर्थ वर्कशॉप कर दुनिया के सबसे शक्तिशाली सांस लेने के व्यायाम को जानें:

 ज्यादातर लोग नहीं जानते कि वे अपने फेफड़ों की क्षमता का केवल 33% उपयोग कर रहे हैं। इसे योगिक श्वास या गहरी केंद्रित श्वास सीखकर बढ़ाया जा सकता है। श्वास और ध्यान चुनौती के दिन 2 पर, हम आपको शक्तिशाली साँस लेने के व्यायाम लाते हैं जो ऑक्सीजन के लिए आपके फेफड़ों की क्षमता को बढ़ा सकते हैं। साँस लेने के व्यायाम और ध्यान का संयोजन आपके शरीर को पुनर्जीवित करेगा और आपके दिमाग को आराम देगा।

 दुनिया में सबसे शक्तिशाली श्वास और ध्यान अभ्यास सीखकर अपनी ऑक्सीजन क्षमता का अनुकूलन करें, ऑनलाइन ध्यान और सांस लेने की क्रिया पर सुदर्शन क्रिया: a https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर के बारे में

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर विश्व प्रसिद्ध मानवतावादी, आध्यात्मिक नेता और शांति और मानवीय मूल्यों के राजदूत हैं। अपने जीवन और कार्य के माध्यम से, गुरुदेव ने दुनिया भर में लाखों लोगों को एक तनाव-मुक्त और हिंसा-मुक्त दुनिया की दृष्टि से प्रेरित किया।
 गुरुदेव ने द आर्ट ऑफ लिविंग की स्थापना की, जो एक गैर-लाभकारी संगठन है जो तनाव-प्रबंधन और सेवा की पहल में लगा हुआ है। गुरुदेव द्वारा डिजाइन किए गए कार्यक्रम लोगों को तकनीकों और उपकरणों के साथ एक गहन और आनंदित जीवन जीने के लिए सशक्त बनाते हैं।

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.description:
கோபாலபுரத்திலுள்ள தனது தாயாரை சந்தித்து வாழ்த்துப் பெற்றார் மு.க.ஸ்டாலின்

தமிழகத்தில் திமுக ஆட்சியைக் கைப்பற்றியுள்ள நிலையில், தாயாரிடம் மு.க.ஸ்டாலின் வாழ்த்து

தாயார் வீட்டுக்கு எதிரே இருந்த குடும்ப நண்பர் வீட்டுக்குச் சென்றும் வாழ்த்துப் பெற்றுக் கொண்டார்

ஸ்டாலின் திடீர் வருகையால் எதிர் வீட்டுக்காரர்கள் மகிழ்ச்சியில் திக்குமுக்காடினர்

Thikasaniche maskat is a Konkani breakfast recipe. This is a very easy and simple recipe. It is made from wheat flour. It gets nice net and turns out crispy. You can also can this ghavane, or dhiradi or pole. This is a very healthy and quick recipe. It can be made from very few ingredients those are easily available in your pantry. You can try this recipe at home and drop a comment for me. Do not forget to like, share and subscribe.

Ingredients:
• 1 cup Wheat flour
• 1/4 tsp Cumin seeds
• 1/4 tsp Carom seeds / Ajwain
• Finely chopped Green chili
• 2 tsp shredded fresh Coconut
• 1/4 tsp Turmeric powder
• Salt to taste
• Water
• Finely chopped Coriander leaves
• Oil

Method:
• In a bowl take wheat flour, cumin seeds, ajwain, green chili, fresh coconut, turmeric powder, 
  salt and mix everything well together. 
• Add a little water at a time to make a little runny batter like dosa batter. 
• No lumps of wheat flour should be formed. 
• Add coriander leaves and mix well. 
• Heat up a pan on medium heat and spread oil on it. 
• Mix the batter well once transfer on the pan. 
• Spread it little and roast until lower side gets nice golden color. 
• When lower side gets nice golden color spread a little oil on upper side and flip maskat over 
  carefully. 
• When lower side also gets nice golden color, transfer the masakt into a dish. 
• Thiksaniche maskat is all ready.
• You can serve maskat with coconut chutney.

I am Prateek Rathee an Entrepreneur based out of Gurugram Delhi. I am a Home Developer and Founder at Homezop (https://Homezop.com).

I love sharing the stories and experiences that I have accumulated in the past 9 years of being in business and scaling multiple bootstrapped and funded companies.

snippet.title: Healing Through Breath | Day 1 of 10 Days Breath And Meditation Journey With Gurudev
snippet.description:
Healing Through Breath | Day 1 of 10 Days Breath And Meditation Journey With Gurudev

Join our free 3-Day personalised Covid care program with our teachers to support - prevention, isolation care and recovery from Covid through Meditation, Breath and Yoga - http://aoliv.in/fightcorona

It took a global pandemic to make the world realize that our breath is the most important aspect of our being. With the second wave of COVID-19 ravaging the lives of thousands of people and the country's health infrastructure, it is time we take the responsibility of our lungs into our own hands.

The 10-Day breathing and meditation challenge brings you powerful breathing exercises that optimize your body's oxygen capacity and invigorating meditations that will completely relax your mind. Today, we will learn the Art of Breathing Right. We have been on this planet for decades but still, we don't know how to breathe in the right manner. Let's learn this basic thing today and follow it up with energizing exercises and meditation.

Join the 10 Day Breath and Meditation Journey on http://aoliv.in/10days

About Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar

Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar is a world-renowned humanitarian, spiritual leader, and ambassador of peace and human values. Through his life and work, Gurudev has inspired millions around the world with a vision of a stress-free and violence-free world.
Gurudev founded The Art of Living, a non-profit organization that is engaged in stress-management and service initiatives. The programs designed by Gurudev empower people with techniques and tools to live a deeper and blissful life.

#GurudevSriSriRaviShankar #ArtofLiving #BreathHeals

hi.description:
सांस के माध्यम से हीलिंग | गुरुदेव के साथ 10 दिन की सांस और ध्यान की यात्रा 1 दिन

 हमारे शिक्षकों के साथ हमारे निशुल्क 3-दिवसीय व्यक्तिगत कोविद देखभाल कार्यक्रम में शामिल हों - ध्यान, सांस और योग के माध्यम से कोविद से रोकथाम, अलगाव देखभाल और वसूली - http://aoliv.in/fightcorona

 दुनिया को यह एहसास दिलाने के लिए एक वैश्विक महामारी का सामना करना पड़ा कि हमारी सांस हमारे अस्तित्व का सबसे महत्वपूर्ण पहलू है। COVID-19 की दूसरी लहर से हजारों लोगों के जीवन और देश के स्वास्थ्य के बुनियादी ढांचे को नुकसान पहुंचा रहा है, यह समय है जब हम अपने फेफड़ों की जिम्मेदारी अपने हाथों में लेते हैं।

 10-दिवसीय श्वास और ध्यान चुनौती आपको शक्तिशाली साँस लेने के व्यायाम लाती है जो आपके शरीर की ऑक्सीजन क्षमता को अनुकूलित करती है और ध्यान को शांत करती है जो आपके दिमाग को पूरी तरह से शांत कर देती है। आज, हम आर्ट ऑफ़ ब्रीथिंग राइट सीखेंगे। हम इस ग्रह पर दशकों से हैं, लेकिन फिर भी, हम नहीं जानते कि कैसे सही तरीके से साँस लेना है। आइए आज इस मूल बात को सीखें और इसे व्यायाम और ध्यान के साथ अपनाएं।

 Http://aoliv.in/10days पर 10 दिवसीय सांस और ध्यान यात्रा में शामिल हों

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर के बारे में

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर विश्व प्रसिद्ध मानवतावादी, आध्यात्मिक नेता और शांति और मानवीय मूल्यों के राजदूत हैं। अपने जीवन और कार्य के माध्यम से, गुरुदेव ने दुनिया भर में लाखों लोगों को एक तनाव-मुक्त और हिंसा-मुक्त दुनिया की दृष्टि से प्रेरित किया।
 गुरुदेव ने द आर्ट ऑफ लिविंग की स्थापना की, जो एक गैर-लाभकारी संगठन है जो तनाव-प्रबंधन और सेवा की पहल में लगा हुआ है। गुरुदेव द्वारा डिजाइन किए गए कार्यक्रम लोगों को तकनीकों और उपकरणों के साथ एक गहन और आनंदित जीवन जीने के लिए सशक्त बनाते हैं।

 # गुरुदेव श्रीश्री रविशंकर

en.title: Healing Through Breath | Day 1 of 10 Days Breath And Meditation Journey With Gurudev
en.description:
Healing Through Breath | Day 1 of 10 Days Breath And Meditation Journey With Gurudev

Join our free 3-Day personalised Covid care program with our teachers to support - prevention, isolation care and recovery from Covid through Meditation, Breath and Yoga - http://aoliv.in/fightcorona

It took a global pandemic to make the world realize that our breath is the most important aspect of our being. With the second wave of COVID-19 ravaging the lives of thousands of people and the country's health infrastructure, it is time we take the responsibility of our lungs into our own hands.

The 10-Day breathing and meditation challenge brings you powerful breathing exercises that optimize your body's oxygen capacity and invigorating meditations that will completely relax your mind. Today, we will learn the Art of Breathing Right. We have been on this planet for decades but still, we don't know how to breathe in the right manner. Let's learn this basic thing today and follow it up with energizing exercises and meditation.

Join the 10 Day Breath and Meditation Journey on http://aoliv.in/10days

About Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar

Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar is a world-renowned humanitarian, spiritual leader, and ambassador of peace and human values. Through his life and work, Gurudev has inspired millions around the world with a vision of a stress-free and violence-free world.
Gurudev founded The Art of Living, a non-profit organization that is engaged in stress-management and service initiatives. The programs designed by Gurudev empower people with techniques and tools to live a deeper and blissful life.

#GurudevSriSriRaviShankar #ArtofLiving #BreathHeals

Kahe aau gote katha

snippet.title: Kidnap - Free Fire x UnGraduate Gamer
snippet.description:
FreeFire's First Real Life Short Film in Indian Community.

This time we have done a live-action FreeFire shoot with the help of @Havok Nation - The Gamers Destination . 

VFX Artist - https://youtu.be/Ug_DsN61Q8U

Summary - The story of this video goes like this...
The Real Bounty Hunter Ayush was kidnapped by Super Villian and tried to erase his super skills and memory, Sanam somehow rescued Ayush but Supervillain tracked his location and tried to kill him again.

PC Mod and Shoot Exceccution by Havok Nation 
- https://www.instagram.com/havoknationin/
Shoot by Abhijeet Kalamkar and Vishal Jadhav
- https://www.instagram.com/abhijeet.k.photography/
- https://www.instagram.com/vishal8jadhav/
VFX by Jai Gurjar (Shortpants)
- https://www.instagram.com/shortpants_vfx/

- https://www.instagram.com/vijaya_0717/

Cast:
Team UG - Ayush and Sanam

snippet.title: Kerala Election Result 2021 : തനിക്ക് രണ്ടാം സ്ഥാനം തന്ന Poonjarലെ ജനങ്ങളോട് നന്ദി പറഞ്ഞ്  PC George
snippet.description:
തനിക്ക് രണ്ടാം സ്ഥാനം തന്ന Poonjarലെ ജനങ്ങളോട് നന്ദി പറഞ്ഞ് PC George. ഒരു വിഭാ​ഗം തന്നെ തെറ്റിദ്ധരിച്ചെന്ന് പിസി പറഞ്ഞു. കേരളത്തിലെ തെര‍ഞ്ഞെടുപ്പ് ഫലത്തിൽ പിണറായിസമാണ് കണ്ടതെന്നും അദ്ദേഹം പറഞ്ഞു.  
#PCGeorge #Poonjar 

Counting of votes began in the high-stakes Assam, West Bengal, Kerala, Tamil Nadu, and Puducherry assembly elections, overshadowed by the raging COVID pandemic. Who will win Kerala Election 2021-  LDF or UDF? Does BJP led NDA have a chance? What will happen in the turfs of Bengal, Assam, Tamil Nadu, and Puducherry? Stay tuned to News18 Kerala for a minute-to-minute update of the poll results. 

#ElectionResultsWithNews18 #KeralaAssemblyElectionResults2021 #Elections2021

ml.title: Kerala Election Result 2021 : തനിക്ക് രണ്ടാം സ്ഥാനം തന്ന Poonjarലെ ജനങ്ങളോട് നന്ദി പറഞ്ഞ്  PC George
ml.description:
തനിക്ക് രണ്ടാം സ്ഥാനം തന്ന Poonjarലെ ജനങ്ങളോട് നന്ദി പറഞ്ഞ് PC George. ഒരു വിഭാ​ഗം തന്നെ തെറ്റിദ്ധരിച്ചെന്ന് പിസി പറഞ്ഞു. കേരളത്തിലെ തെര‍ഞ്ഞെടുപ്പ് ഫലത്തിൽ പിണറായിസമാണ് കണ്ടതെന്നും അദ്ദേഹം പറഞ്ഞു.  
#PCGeorge #Poonjar

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.title: SECRET BEAUTY HACKS AND DIY IDEAS
snippet.description:
Incredible secrets revealed in this 5-Minute Crafts video
Hey, beauties. Today we’re going to take a deep dive into the fantastic world of beauty and makeup. We’ll show you some beauty secrets that work wonders and other amazing hacks you can try in your beauty routine. 
-         Do you want natural-looking freckles that make you look young and refreshing. Apply some brown, liquid eyeliner to your finger and then tap it on your skin (cheeks and nose), then apply powder on top to set it, and voila.
-         You don’t need expensive eyeshadow brushes to give yourself a great eye look. We show you how to get a fiery look using your fingers.
-         Do you want to get a temporary tattoo this summer? Print your favorite design on a piece of paper and then apply the printed drawing on your hand, then spray perfume on your hand, and voila. 
-         If your makeup pallets are too dirty, we show you a very simple way to clean them. Watch the video to find out. 
Timestamps:
1:33 – Cute DIY fake braces
2:35 – Beautiful lipstick ideas
3:58 – DIY fake nails
4:39 – Hairstyles for long curly hair
7:30 – How to clean a dirty makeup palette
10:29 – A great mascara hack 
This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

The following video might feature activity performed by our actors within controlled environment- please use judgment, care, and precaution if you plan to replicate.

We as a company have passion to reach out to the Tamil speaking population world over with the honest and responsible presentation of news and current affairs that reflects the true spirit of journalism and reported with authenticity, clarity and definitive conviction. We believe that a decision made by individuals in the society who have access to information that is truthful and unbiased has the potential to impact and change the society at large. All the broadcasts of Sathiyam Television will express news in a manner that is true, integral, understandable and devoid of sensationalism or slander of any kind. All broadcasts of Sathiyam Television have a singular focus of arming the viewer with the truth that would empower them to make a decision by themselves. This change we believe in turn will prepare our Nation to face the reality of truth and motivate its citizens to operate based on their individual decision.

Sathiyam is aiming to become a strong and competitive channel in the GEC space of Tamil Television scenario. Sathiyam’s biggest strength is its people. The channel has some of the best talent on its rolls. A clear vision backed by the best brains gives Sathiyam a clear cut edge in the crowded Tamil TV landscape.

As for DTH, Sathiyam is available in all leading DTH & other OTT  platforms  Sathiyam TV is also available for viewership in the Bangalore, Mysore, Hubli & Dharwad areas of Karnataka and in Mumbai & Kolkata through terrestrial means, apart from a 24X7 web streaming at www.sathiyam.tv

Sathiyam has also ventured into offering media based vocational education and training through its educational arm, Sathiyam Academy. Apart from these, Sathiyam runs a matrimonial service by the name MY BEST COMPANION.

snippet.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 1 May 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara’s birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can’t tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.
 
#Puthiyathalaimurai  #PuthiyathalaimuraiNews #PuthiyathalaimuraiTv #PuthiyathalaimuraiLatestNews  

Tamil News, Puthiya Thalaimurai News, Election News, Tamilnadu News, Political News, Sports News, Funny Videos, Speech, Parliament Election, Live Tamil News, Election speech, Modi, IPL , CSK, MS Dhoni, Suresh Raina, DMK, ADMK, BJP, OPS, EPS

snippet.title: UP Panchayat Chunav में बीजेपी कमजोर और सपा मजबूत हो गई?
snippet.description:
उत्तर प्रदेश में त्रिस्तरीय पंचायत चुनाव के वोटों की गिनती जारी है। यह चुनाव सत्ताधारी बीजेपी के साथ-साथ विपक्षी समाजवादी पार्टी, बीएसपी और कांग्रेस के लिए भी अहम है। राज्य में अगले साल विधानसभा चुनाव हैं। गांव की सरकार के लिए हो रहे इस चुनाव में पार्टियों की असली ताकत जिला पंचायत से तय होगी।
#UPT0167

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
क्लिक कर देखें लेटेस्ट TAk फोटो गैलरी: https://www.tak.live/photogallery
------------------------------------------------------
About the Channel:
जहां कृष्ण राम की जन्मभूमि है। शिव की अविनाषी काशी है। जहां बुद्ध के महापरिनिर्वाण का कुशीनगर है। मुगलों के साम्राज्य के निशां हैं। जो भूमि है देश के 8 प्रधानमंत्रियों की। ऐसा है ये उत्तर प्रदेश। और उत्तर प्रदेश की ख़बरों का नया ठिकाना है UP Tak। 
हम पहुंचेंगे गांव गांव तक। राजनीति की हर हलचल तक। अब नहीं छूटेगी यूपी की कोई ख़बर। क्योंकि आपके मोबाइल में होगा UP Tak

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 4 | Plan B Kya Hai?
snippet.description:
Like the Episode? Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

UPSC is one of the toughest exams in the world with a success rate of less than 1%. As an Aspirant, you can’t ignore the fact that you might not crack it. Abhilash realizes this after talking to SK and Guri, they tell him everyone needs a Plan B. On the other hand, he is also being pressured by his company to end his sabbatical and join again. What will Abhilash do now? What will be his Plan B?

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC: Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Participate in the Unacademy Combat, a weekly scholarship test for UPSC SCE. Use code ASPIRANTS2021 to take the test and compete with peers across the country. Top rankers will also stand a chance to get up to 100% scholarship from a pool worth Rs 1 Crore.
Link - https://unacademy.com/combat/a/KSCGY

Unacademy & The Viral Fever presents ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki 
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish 
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar 
Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat 
Associate Director: Himali Shah 
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti 
Editor: Tushar Manocha 
Music: Rohit Sharma 
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek 
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta 
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan 
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar 
Casting: Ashish Khare, Shiv Chouhan 
Sound Design: Pranit Purao 
Special Mention: Nilotpal Bora for Dhaaga

Music at the Bar: Love U More By Riley & TOMOS
Publishers: Soundcast Music

UPSC fact #91: Satyendra worked as a clerk in the excise department, his marriage was arranged with Aarti. But Aarti ran away a night before their wedding because she found out that she had cleared the PCS exam. Satyendra who was initially heartbroken worked really hard and became an IAS officer. Eventually, Aarti came back into his life and they got married.
PS: It’s a True Story.
-Description Guy.

#TVFAspirants #TVFOriginal #LetsCrackIt #UPSC 

This Channel is owned, operated, and managed by Contagious Online Media Network Private Limited.

Abhilash realizes this after talking to SK and Guri, they tell him everyone needs a Plan B. On the other hand, he is also being pressured by his company to end his sabbatical and join again. What will Abhilash do now? What will be his Plan B?

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC: Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Participate in the Unacademy Combat, a weekly scholarship test for UPSC SCE. Use code ASPIRANTS2021 to take the test and compete with peers across the country. Top rankers will also stand a chance to get up to 100% scholarship from a pool worth Rs 1 Crore.
Link - https://unacademy.com/combat/a/KSCGY

Unacademy & The Viral Fever presents ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki

Casting: Ashish Khare, Shiv Chouhan 
Sound Design: Pranit Purao 
Special Mention: Nilotpal Bora for Dhaaga

Music at the Bar: Love U More By Riley & TOMOS
Publishers: Soundcast Music

UPSC fact #91: Satyendra worked as a clerk in the excise department, his marriage was arranged with Aarti. But Aarti ran away a night before their wedding because she found out that she had cleared the PCS exam. Satyendra who was initially heartbroken worked really hard and became an IAS officer. Eventually, Aarti came back into his life and they got married.
PS: It’s a True Story.
-Description Guy.

snippet.title: Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega (Official Video) Vishal Mishra | Aly Goni, Jasmin Bhasin | VYRL Originals
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents the multi award-winning singer-composer Vishal Mishra’s Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega featuring Bigg Boss fame and popular couple Aly Goni and Jasmin Bhasin. The song has been written by Vishal Mishra and Kaushal Kishore narrating this story from a female perspective. The Music Video has been directed by Navjit Buttar and has been shot in a grand scale. Watch Aly & Jasmin in a never before seen avatar, showcasing skilfully the pain and anguish of a toxic relationship. You are in for a surprise as the story unfolds to a shocking end.

snippet.title: ऑक्सीजन और इम्युनिटी बढ़ाने का आसान तरीका |  Enhance Immunity and Oxygen Levels | Sadhguru Hindi
snippet.description:
सरल योग अभ्यास सीखें - सिंह क्रिया और साष्टांग - सद्गुरु ने यह अभ्यास, इम्युनिटी बढ़ाने और ऑक्सीजन के स्तर को बढ़ाने के लिए डिज़ाइन किए हैं।
इन अभ्यासों के नियम:

1. साष्टांग और मकरासन को खाली पेट की स्थिति में करना चाहिए।

यानि, नीचे दिए निर्देशों के अनुसार कुछ समय रूककर यह दोनों अभ्यास करें:
- भरपेट भोजन करने के बाद 4 घंटे रुकें
- फल या कुछ बिस्कुट जैसा नाश्ता करने के बाद 2.5 घंटे रुकें
- चाय, कॉफी या पानी के अलावा कुछ भी पीने के बाद 1.5 घंटे रुकें
- पानी कभी भी पीया जा सकता है। पानी पीने पर कोई रोक नहीं है।

2. गर्भवती महिलाओं को साष्टांग या मकरासन नहीं करना चाहिए। हालांकि, वे सिंह क्रिया कर सकती हैं।

English Video:

एक योगी, युगदृष्टा, मानवतावादी, सद्‌गुरु एक आधुनिक गुरु हैं, जिनको योग के प्राचीन विज्ञान पर पूर्ण अधिकार है। विश्व शांति और खुशहाली की दिशा में निरंतर काम कर रहे सद्‌गुरु के रूपांतरणकारी कार्यक्रमों से दुनिया के करोडों लोगों को एक नई दिशा मिली है। दुनिया भर में लाखों लोगों को आनंद के मार्ग में दीक्षित किया गया है। 

सद्‌गुरु एप्प डाउनलोड करें 📲
http://onelink.to/sadhguru__app

ईशा फाउंडेशन हिंदी ब्लॉग
http://isha.sadhguru.org/hindi

सद्‌गुरु का ओफ़िशिअल हिंदी फेसबुक चैनल
http://www.facebook.com/SadhguruHindi

सद्‌गुरु का ओफ़िशिअल हिंदी Telegram ग्रुप जॉइन करें 
https://t.me/joinchat/Md1ldBSkRhCIANVu80OSDA

सद्‌गुरु का नि:शुल्क ध्यान ईशा क्रिया सीखने के लिए:
http://hindi.ishakriya.com

Polimer News has evolved as a 24 hours Tamil News satellite TV channel. Polimer is the second largest MSO in TN catering to millions of TV viewing homes across 10 districts of TN. Founded by Mr. P.V. Kalyana Sundaram, the company currently runs 8 basic cable TV channels in various parts of TN and Polimer TV, a fully integrated Tamil GEC reaching out to millions of Tamil viewers across the world. The channel has state of the art production facility in Chennai. Besides a library of more than 350 movies on an exclusive basis , the channel also beams 8 hours of original content every day. The channel has extended its vision to various genres including Reality. In short, Polimer is aiming to become a strong and competitive channel in the GEC space of Tamil Television scenario. Polimer’s biggest strength is its people. The channel has some of the best talent on its rolls. A clear vision backed by the best brains gives Polimer a clear cut edge in the crowded Tamil TV landscape.

snippet.title: Delhi का निकला दम, CM Kejriwal बोले - 'अस्पतालों में मचा हाहाकार, डॉक्टर्स को निकालने पड़ेंगे मरीज'
snippet.description:
कोरोना वायरस का संकट देश के अलग-अलग हिस्सों में बढ़ता जा रहा है. कई तरह की पाबंदियां लगाने के बाद भी कोरोना के मामलों में कोई कटौती होती नहीं दिख रही है. सबसे बुरा हाल इस वक्त राजधानी दिल्ली और उसके आसपास के इलाके का है. क्योंकि यहां हर दिन कोरोना के मरीजों की संख्या बढ़ रही है, लेकिन अस्पताल में ना तो बेड्स हैं, ना ही ऑक्सीजन. घर पर इलाज के लिए भी किसी को ऑक्सीजन नहीं मिल पा रहा है, ऐसे में संकट बढ़ता जा रहा है.

कोरोना वायरस का संकट देश के अलग-अलग हिस्सों में बढ़ता जा रहा है. कई तरह की पाबंदियां लगाने के बाद भी कोरोना के मामलों में कोई कटौती होती नहीं दिख रही है. सबसे बुरा हाल इस वक्त राजधानी दिल्ली और उसके आसपास के इलाके का है. क्योंकि यहां हर दिन कोरोना के मरीजों की संख्या बढ़ रही है, लेकिन अस्पताल में ना तो बेड्स हैं, ना ही ऑक्सीजन. घर पर इलाज के लिए भी किसी को ऑक्सीजन नहीं मिल पा रहा है, ऐसे में संकट बढ़ता जा रहा है.

West Bengal Election Results 2021:  पश्चिम बंगाल में ऐतिहासिक जीत दर्ज कर ममता बनर्जी सभी के सामने आईं. ममता के पैर में लगा प्लास्टर हट गया है और यहां उन्होंने मंच से संबोधित करते हुए कहा कि जय बंगाल, बंगाल ही कर सकता है. ममता ने कार्यकर्ताओं से मास्क लगाने और शांति से घर लौटने की अपील की.

#AajTakHD #HindiNews #AajTak #aajtaklivetv #aajtakhindi 
#today_breaking_news #aajtak

snippet.title: Matchday Live with Cheeka | Match 30 KKR VS RCB | IPL 2021
snippet.description:
Match 30 of the IPL Is about to get underway and we have a keen contest between the  Kolklata knight riders and the royal challengers bangalore. RCB have had a good run this season in the IPL and are now placed at 3rd position while the KKR boys seem to be all over the place with no unification. 

RCB are the starting favorites for this match and the rcb fans would want the men in red to continue with the form that they are in. The match is expected to be played at Ahmedabad which looks like a good wicket to bat on. kkr need to solve their internal issues get the right balance in the xi and most importantly hope that their main playing xi fire from all cylinders. 

Join us live on matchday live with cheeka at 12pm where cheeka and anirudha srikkanth host an exciting live stream on the upcoming match.

snippet.title: എളുപ്പത്തിൽ ചൂട് ചൂട് സമോസ ഉണ്ടാക്കാം || Easy Chicken Samosa || Lekshmi Nair
snippet.description:
Hello dear friends, this is my 475th Vlog. In this video demonstrate how to make easy easy Chicken Samosa.

How to make Easy Chicken Samosa

Chicken -  250 gms
Kashmiri chilli powder - 1/2 tsp +  1/2 tsp
Pepper powder - 1/2 tsp +   1/2 tsp
Salt( according to taste )
Turmeric powder - 1/4 tsp +   1/4 tsp
Big onion - 3 nos (Finely chopped)
green chillies - 2 - 5 nos (Finely chopped)
Refined oil
Garam Masala powder - 1/2 tsp
Coriander leaves
Maida ( All Purpose Flour ) - 11/2  Cup
Dalda - 11/2  -  2 tbs
Rice flour 

Please share your valuable feedback's through the comment box.
Don't forget to Like, Share and Subscribe. Love you all :)

It’s me Lekshmi Nair, a celebrity culinary expert. Cooking has always been my passion. Since my childhood, I loved experimenting and trying new dishes and recipes. This YouTube channel ‘#LekshmiNairVlogs’ is my latest venture to share my recipes with you and to be connected with you.
